Off Calendar Mar-02-2017 Judgment Entered

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-02-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 306 Judge Richard Ulmer, Clerk S. Ravinantapricha. Not reported.
This cause comes on calendar regularly as assigned by Dept. 206 for trial de novo (Plaintiff's Claim and Defendant's Claim )
Appearances:
Appellant/Respondent (Defendant/Cross Complainant) Jim Khorge present with special appearance counsel Yvette Davis.
Respondent/Appellant (Plaintiff/Cross Defendant) Roger Marenco present in pro per.
Parties are sworn and testifies on they own behalf.

The Court reviews the case file; hears testimony; reviews documents and exhibits as presented in open court. Further, hears argument and response to questions from the Court.

After hearing and considering the testimony and evidence presented, the court AFFIRMS the
Judgement, granted Respondent/Appellant (Plaintiff/Cross Defendant) Roger Marenco a judgement in principal amount of $150.00; costs $80.00, for a total of $230.00. and AFFIRMS the Judgement, granted Appellant/Respondent (Defendant/Cross Complainant) Jim Khorge a judgement in principal amount of $950.00; costs $105.00, for a total of $1,055.00.

Judgement on appeal is final and case is remanded back to Small Claims Court.
No exhibits retained by the court.
